channel.title: Yellowstone Season Alerts
channel.description: New season notifications for Yellowstone from TVmaze metadata.

item.title: Season 5 — Premieres 2022-11-13
item.description: Premiere: 2022-11-13 | Finale: 2024-12-15 | Episodes: 14 | Network: Paramount Network
